query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE archived_at IS NULL) AS active_contacts,
  COUNT(*) AS total_pairs,
  SUM(status = 'pending') AS pending,
  SUM(status = 'merged') AS merged,
  SUM(status = 'dismissed') AS dismissed
FROM duplicate_contact_pairs;

  COUNT(*) AS total_pairs,
  SUM(status = 'pending') AS pending,
